task_completion.description: Update the facility name to LibreHealth Medical Center
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LibreHealth EHR facility configuration form, the 'Name' text field contains exactly 'LibreHealth Medical Center'.
In the facility configuration form, the 'Federal EIN' (or similar EIN) text field contains exactly '12-3456789'.

task_completion.description: Update the email address to admin@librehealth.org
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the facility configuration form, the 'Email' text field contains exactly 'admin@librehealth.org'.

task_completion.description: Update the website URL to https://www.librehealth.org
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the facility configuration form, the 'Website' or 'URL' text field contains exactly 'https://www.librehealth.org'.
In the facility configuration form, the 'Phone' text field contains exactly '555-0199'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the facility is designated as a Billing Location
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the facility configuration form, the checkbox or toggle labeled 'Billing Location' is checked or explicitly enabled.
The agent clicks a 'Save' button, a success notification is displayed, or the screen returns to the facility list showing the newly updated 'LibreHealth Medical Center'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreHealth EHR web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the LibreHealth EHR application, rather than terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine LibreHealth EHR application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches standard LibreHealth EHR styling and navigation menus, not a generic text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open and being used to alter the DOM text to simulate task completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target facility to update is the primary facility (ID 1). The expected values are synthetic test data: Name must be 'LibreHealth Medical Center', Federal EIN must be '12-3456789', Email must be 'admin@librehealth.org', Website must be 'https://www.librehealth.org', and Phone must be '555-0199'. The 'Billing Location' setting must be enabled (checked/true). Verify these exact values are entered into the LibreHealth EHR facility configuration form.
